items.title: EDPB meets with EU Commissioner McGrath and adopts common data breach notification template
items.summary: Brussels, 10 June – During its latest plenary, the EDPB met with Michael McGrath, Commissioner for Democracy, Justice, the Rule of Law and Consumer Protection. In addition, the Board has adopted a common data breach notification template . The Board held a meeting with Commission…
items.ai_summary: EDPB adopts common data breach notification template to standardize GDPR breach reporting requirements.

items.title: Europe Day 2026: let’s celebrate together
items.summary: Brussels, 5 May – On 9 May each year, Europeans celebrate the anniversary of the Schuman Declaration, the key moment which led to the creation of the EU as we know it today. To mark this special occasion, the European institutions will open their doors to the public on 9 May 2026…
items.ai_summary: Europe Day 2026 celebration announcement by EU institutions on 9 May 2026.

items.title: Marking 10 years of the GDPR: the evolution of the European data protection landscape
items.summary: Brussels, 27 April – Today marks the 10th anniversary of the GDPR’s adoption, the first comprehensive data protection framework spanning an entire continent, establishing clear rights for individuals and obligations for organisations across Europe. The moment that led to the crea…
items.ai_summary: EDPB marks 10 years of GDPR, Europe's landmark data protection framework adopted 10 years ago.

items.title: Stakeholder event on competition and data protection

items.title: EDPB brings clarity to data processing for scientific research, speeds up the finalisation of the anonymisation guidelines and approves first European data protection seal as a tool for transfers
items.summary: Brussels, 16 April – During its latest plenary, the EDPB has adopted Guidelines on processing of personal data for scientific research purposes . In addition, the Board has created a team to speed up the finalisation of the guidelines on anonymisation. The EDPB has also adopted t…
items.ai_summary: EDPB adopts guidelines for scientific research data processing, anonymization standards, and EU data protection seal.
